title: Ipla
description: Place any item on any block side, up to 4 on one side
body:
# IPLA
Place your favourite items exactly the way you want
Ipla is a decorative Minecraft mod that lets you place almost any item from your inventory directly into the world, with full control over its position, rotation, and orientation.
Forget item frames and their strict limits. With Ipla, items become true world objects.

# Controls
- V to place item
- Shift + V to place item as 1/4 of a block side
- Alt + Mousewheel to rotate items
- IF CONTROLS NOT WORKING DOWNLOAD MOD THAT ALLOWS MULTIPLE KEYBINDS TO WORK AT THE SAME TIME

# Features
- Place items freely on walls, floors, ceilings, or in mid-air
- Rotate and tilt items
- Fine-tune placement using simple controls
- Items stay fixed in place and persist after world reloads
- Hold right click with empty hand to eat food
